raw_cv_text:
Yara Al-Rashid
+44 20 7946 0958 | Email: yara.alrashid@gmail.com | LinkedIn: yara-al-rashid | GitHub: YaraAlRashid | https://yara.dev
EDUCATION
Imperial College London | MSc Cyber Security 2019-2021
Achieved distinction with 78% average; led secure coding workshop for 45+ students covering
OWASP Top 10 and threat modeling
Thesis on 'Runtime API Monitoring for Zero-Day Detection in Microservices' published as
conference paper with 340+ citations
University of Waterloo | BASc Computer Science (Honours) 2015-2019
Graduated with 3.87/4.0 GPA; President of Cybersecurity Club growing membership from 12 to 120+
members over 2 years
Co-authored 2 peer-reviewed security papers on cryptographic side-channel attacks and supply chain
vulnerability analysis
EXPERIENCE
Cloudflare | Senior Application Security Engineer 2023-Present
Led security review of microservices platform processing 25M+ requests/sec; identified 18 critical
vulnerabilities reducing CVSS exposure by 94% and preventing estimated $12M+ in breach costs
Architected SAST/DAST pipeline reducing mean time to vulnerability detection from 23 days to 4.2
days across 180+ engineering teams; achieved 99.2% false positive suppression rate
Designed custom WAF rules for GraphQL APIs blocking 2.3M+ attack payloads monthly (99.7%
precision) while maintaining 99.95% legitimate traffic throughput
Stripe | Application Security Engineer 2021-2023
Established threat modeling framework adopted across 12 product teams; completed 47 threat models
discovering 156 design-level risks with 89% remediation rate within SLA
Reduced payment API latency from 18ms to 12.4ms (31% improvement) while adding
comprehensive input validation; handled $890B+ in annual transaction volume with zero
authentication bypasses
Built automated secrets detection system scanning 2.1M commits/month across monorepo; prevented
23 incidents preventing exposure of AWS/payment processor credentials
Wise | Security Engineer (Application Security Focus) 2019-2021
Led incident response for 8 critical vulnerabilities in payment reconciliation services affecting 4.2M+
user accounts; achieved 100% remediation in 6.5 hours average MTTR
Implemented OAuth 2.0/OIDC authentication overhaul serving 180+ API clients; reduced
authentication-related incidents by 87% while decreasing token validation latency by 15.3ms
Conducted 52 secure code reviews across fintech Python/Golang codebases; trained 34 engineers
achieving 78% reduction in OWASP Top 10 findings in subsequent sprints
Palantir Technologies | Security Intelligence Analyst (Contract) 2018-2019
Analyzed 340+ data pipeline configurations identifying 67 privilege escalation pathways; remediation
roadmap prevented estimated 12 high-impact incidents based on threat intelligence correlation
Developed Python framework for automated SQL injection pattern detection across distributed
systems achieving 94.2% recall with 98.1% precision on 180K+ query samples
Conducted red team assessment of access control matrices across 18 internal platforms; discovered 23
logic flaws including IDOR and broken function-level access control allowing lateral movement
PROJECTS
VulnRadar | Python, FastAPI, PostgreSQL, Kubernetes, YARA Rules 2022-Present
Open-source runtime vulnerability scanner for containerized applications; 2,840+ GitHub stars,
280K+ monthly downloads; detects 340+ CVE patterns with 92.3% true positive rate
Implemented adaptive ML-based anomaly detection reducing scan time by 68% (from 240s to 77s
per image) while maintaining 99.1% vulnerability coverage accuracy
CryptoShield | Rust, C, LLVM, OpenSSL, TLS 1.3 2021-2023
Cryptographic vulnerability detection library for C/C++/Rust codebases; 1,240+ stars, 95K+ weekly
downloads; identified 156+ real-world cryptographic misuse patterns in production systems
Achieved sub-2ms analysis latency per 10K lines of code with zero false negatives on 45 OWASP
crypto test cases; integrated into CI/CD pipelines for 40+ enterprises
AuthPulse | TypeScript, Node.js, Next.js, OAuth 2.0, SAML 2.0 2020-2022
Reference implementation and testing harness for OAuth 2.0/OIDC compliance; 1,680+ GitHub stars,
156K+ total clones; certified against 34 official OpenID Foundation test cases
Provides 18+ pre-configured vulnerability scenarios with 99.7% accuracy in simulating real-world
authentication attacks; used in security training by 12 Fortune 500 companies
EXTRACURRICULAR
Black Hat USA & OWASP Global AppSec | Conference Speaker & Training Instructor 2021-Present
Delivered 8 talks on microservices security and API threat modeling to 2,400+ security practitioners;
2023 talk 'Zero-Trust Architecture for Polyglot APIs' achieved 4.8/5.0 attendee rating
Designed 6-hour intensive workshop on runtime security and behavior-based anomaly detection;
trained 340+ engineers with 89% reporting significant improvement in threat detection capabilities
OWASP Project Leadership & OSS Mentorship | OWASP Top 10 Maintainer & Senior 2020-
Mentor (Linux Foundation) Present
Co-maintained OWASP Top 10 2021 release guiding 45+ security researchers; document received
2.3M+ downloads and integrated into 180+ university cybersecurity curricula globally
Mentored 12 junior security engineers through formal program; 11 mentees promoted to senior/lead
roles within 18-24 months with average 34% salary increase
TECHNICAL SKILLS
Languages – Python, Rust, Go, TypeScript, Java, C, SQL, Bash
Technologies – OAuth 2.0, OIDC, SAML 2.0, TLS 1.3, AES-256, RSA, WebAuthn, FIDO2,
Kubernetes, Docker, Apache Kafka, gRPC, GraphQL, REST APIs, JWT
Tools – Burp Suite Professional, OWASP ZAP, SonarQube, Snyk, Checkmarx, GitLab SAST, AWS
Security Hub, Datadog, ELK Stack, Splunk, Threat Modeling (Microsoft Threat Modeling Tool),
Wireshark, Metasploit
name: Yara Al-Rashid

projects.name: VulnRadar
projects.subtitle: Python, FastAPI, PostgreSQL, Kubernetes, YARA Rules

extracurricular.name: Black Hat USA & OWASP Global AppSec
extracurricular.subtitle: Conference Speaker & Training Instructor
